docket_entries.description: SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF MUSVEE, SAMEED AS TO DEFENDANT ZEUS LIVING

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-18-2020 - CONTINUED ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION TO FEB-09-2021 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF SAMEED MUSVEE IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT ZUES LIVING IS PRESENT AND IS REPRESENTED BY SARA KATZ, A LICENSED ATTORNEY, CA STATE BAR NUMBER 321553. COUNSEL IS INFORMED THAT AN ATTORNEY CAN NOT REPRESENT LITIGANTS IN SMALL CLAIMS MATTERS AND THAT SHE DOES NOT HAVE AUTHORITY TO REPRESENT THE DEFEDANT IN THIS ACTION. PLAINTIFF EXPRESS INTEREST IN TALKS OF AN EFFORT OF REACHING A POSSIBLE SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. COUNSEL OPPOSES ANY TALKS OF A POTENTIAL SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. COURT INSTRUCTS COUNSEL TO HAVE A REPRESENTATVIE FOR ZUES LIVING PRESENT AT THE NEXT HEARING DATE. COMMISSIONER PANG LY; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
ORDER CONTINUED ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION TO FEBRUARY 9, 2021 AT 1:30 P.M. D. 506.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY MUSVEE, SAMEED AS TO DEFENDANT ZEUS LIVING ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-18-2020 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED JUN-17-2020, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT ZEUS LIVING
DISMISSAL WITH PREJUDICE OF CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FILED BY PLAINTIFF MUSVEE, SAMEED AS TO DEFENDANT ZEUS LIVING CLAIM HEARING OF FEB-09-2021 OFF CALENDAR, DISMISSAL FILED
